text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Section 3, Sub- section (ii)] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS New Delhi, the 12" October, 2012 NOTIFICATION S.0. .. E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 381of the Wild Life (Protection) Act. 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.0. 1403(E), dated the 4" September, 2006, namely:- In the said notification.- (a) for serial numbers 1 and 2 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted. namely:- 1. The Minister of State (Independent charge) in charge - Chairperson of the Ministry of Environment and Forests 2. Vacant - Vice-Chairperson:™; (b) for serial numbers 14 to 21 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted. namely:- “14. Secretary, Ministry of Environment and Forests - Member 15, Director General of Forests and Special Secretary = Member Ministry of Environment and Forests 16, Secretary. Ministry of Tribal Affairs R Member 17. Sceretary. Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment - Member 18. Chairperson, National Commission for the Scheduled Tribes - Member* 19.
